proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_009` equal to 1 have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than cell lines with `feature_009` equal to 0.
Cell lines with `feature_022` equal to 1 have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than cell lines with `feature_022` equal to 0.
Cell lines with `feature_024` equal to 1 have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than cell lines with `feature_024` equal to 0.
Cell lines with `feature_014` equal to 1 have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than cell lines with `feature_014` equal to 0.
Cell lines with `feature_027` equal to 1 have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than cell lines with `feature_027` equal to 0.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_009=1` versus all other lines: subgroup mean -0.8047 vs comparison mean -0.2495, effect -0.5552 on dependency_BRAF; p<1e-300.
`feature_022=1` versus all other lines: subgroup mean -0.6010 vs comparison mean -0.2524, effect -0.3486 on dependency_EGFR; p<1e-300.
`feature_024=1` versus all other lines: subgroup mean -0.6856 vs comparison mean -0.2535, effect -0.4321 on dependency_ERBB2; p<1e-300.
`feature_014=1` versus all other lines: subgroup mean -0.5594 vs comparison mean -0.2520, effect -0.3075 on dependency_KRAS; p<1e-300.
`feature_027=1` versus all other lines: subgroup mean -0.3527 vs comparison mean -0.2572, effect -0.0955 on dependency_RIT1; p=1.55e-68.

iterations.update: Strong binary-feature main effects appeared for BRAF, EGFR, ERBB2, KRAS, and RIT1, motivating lineage and subtype interaction checks.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The `dependency_BRAF` signal is especially concentrated in the subgroup with `feature_009=1` and `feature_011="skin"`, which should have more negative scores than all other cell lines.
Among `feature_024=1` cell lines, `feature_010="her2_enriched"` further lowers `dependency_ERBB2` beyond the additive effects of `feature_024=1` and `feature_010="her2_enriched"`.

The `feature_014=1` association with more negative `dependency_KRAS` is present within both `feature_011="pancreatic"` and `feature_011="colorectal"` cell lines rather than being limited to one lineage.
Among `feature_027=1` cell lines, `feature_011="brain"` further lowers `dependency_RIT1` beyond the additive effects of `feature_027=1` and `feature_011="brain"`.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_009=1` and `feature_011="skin"` versus all other lines: subgroup mean -0.8114 vs comparison mean -0.2909, effect -0.5205 on dependency_BRAF; p<1e-300.
`feature_024=1` by `feature_010="her2_enriched"`: interaction coefficient -0.0671 on dependency_ERBB2; p=3.72e-02. Cell counts base+modifier/base-only/modifier-only/neither = 142/4748/888/44222.
analyses.method: OLS interaction model: dependency ~ base + modifier + base:modifier

analyses.code: Within pancreatic lines: Welch t-test by feature_014
analyses.result_summary: `feature_014=1` versus `feature_014=0` within `feature_011="pancreatic"`: group A mean -0.5591 vs group B mean -0.2489, effect -0.3102 on dependency_KRAS; p=7.58e-197.
analyses.method: Welch two-sample t-test within a fixed subgroup

analyses.code: Within colorectal lines: Welch t-test by feature_014
analyses.result_summary: `feature_014=1` versus `feature_014=0` within `feature_011="colorectal"`: group A mean -0.5493 vs group B mean -0.2454, effect -0.3039 on dependency_KRAS; p=1.49e-208.
analyses.method: Welch two-sample t-test within a fixed subgroup

analyses.result_summary: `feature_027=1` by `feature_011="brain"`: interaction coefficient -0.0582 on dependency_RIT1; p=5.64e-03. Cell counts base+modifier/base-only/modifier-only/neither = 329/4231/3236/42204.
analyses.method: OLS interaction model: dependency ~ base + modifier + base:modifier

iterations.update: Most oncogene dependencies were driven primarily by their binary feature, but ERBB2 and RIT1 showed additional subtype/lineage heterogeneity.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_011="colorectal"` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than non-colorectal cell lines.
Within the `feature_011="colorectal"` context, `feature_035=1` further lowers `dependency_KIF18A` beyond additive colorectal and `feature_035` effects.
Within the `feature_011="colorectal"` context, `feature_028 >= 0.819` further lowers `dependency_KIF18A` beyond additive colorectal and high-`feature_028` effects.
Within the `feature_011="colorectal"` context, `feature_020=1` suppresses the `dependency_KIF18A` signal, making scores less negative than expected from additive effects.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_011="colorectal"` versus all other lines: subgroup mean -0.7204 vs comparison mean -0.2524, effect -0.4680 on dependency_KIF18A; p<1e-300.
`feature_011="colorectal"` by `feature_035=1`: interaction coefficient -0.6822 on dependency_KIF18A; p<1e-300. Cell counts base+modifier/base-only/modifier-only/neither = 3925/1891/5360/38824.
analyses.method: OLS interaction model: dependency ~ base + modifier + base:modifier

analyses.result_summary: `feature_011="colorectal"` by `feature_028 >= 0.819`: interaction coefficient -0.6691 on dependency_KIF18A; p<1e-300. Cell counts base+modifier/base-only/modifier-only/neither = 4006/1810/8502/35682.
analyses.method: OLS interaction model: dependency ~ base + modifier + base:modifier

analyses.result_summary: `feature_011="colorectal"` by `feature_020=1`: interaction coefficient 0.5714 on dependency_KIF18A; p<1e-300. Cell counts base+modifier/base-only/modifier-only/neither = 1063/4753/5686/38498.
analyses.method: OLS interaction model: dependency ~ base + modifier + base:modifier

iterations.update: KIF18A was not a generic dependency: the colorectal effect was enabled by `feature_035=1` and high `feature_028`, while `feature_020=1` strongly suppressed it.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The strongest `dependency_KIF18A` subgroup is `feature_011="colorectal"`, `feature_035=1`, `feature_028 >= 0.819`, and `feature_020=0`, and this subgroup has much more negative scores than all other cell lines.
Within `feature_011="colorectal"` cell lines, `feature_020=1` marks a KIF18A-nondependent subgroup with less negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than `feature_020=0` colorectal lines.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_011="colorectal" & feature_035=1 & feature_028>=0.819 & feature_020=0` versus all other lines: subgroup mean -1.2990 vs comparison mean -0.2530, effect -1.0460 on dependency_KIF18A; p<1e-300.

analyses.code: Within colorectal lines: Welch t-test by feature_020
analyses.result_summary: `feature_020=1` versus `feature_020=0` within `feature_011="colorectal"`: group A mean -0.2501 vs group B mean -0.8255, effect 0.5754 on dependency_KIF18A; p=2.07e-275.
analyses.method: Welch two-sample t-test within a fixed subgroup

iterations.update: The complete KIF18A rule separated a very strong dependency subgroup from a colorectal subgroup in which the dependency was nearly absent.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_016 >= 0.964` have more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores than cell lines with lower `feature_016`.
Cell lines with `feature_016 >= 0.964` have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than cell lines with lower `feature_016`.
Cell lines with `feature_016 >= 0.964` have more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than cell lines with lower `feature_016`.
Cell lines with `feature_016 <= 0.694` have less negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores than cell lines with higher `feature_016`, consistent with low `feature_016` suppressing POLR2A dependency.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_016 >= 0.964` versus all other lines: subgroup mean -0.4972 vs comparison mean -0.3928, effect -0.1043 on dependency_POLR2A; p=1.01e-179.
`feature_016 >= 0.964` versus all other lines: subgroup mean -0.3614 vs comparison mean -0.3243, effect -0.0371 on dependency_DHX9; p=1.71e-24.
`feature_016 >= 0.964` versus all other lines: subgroup mean -0.2816 vs comparison mean -0.2447, effect -0.0369 on dependency_TMED10; p=2.52e-24.
`feature_016 <= 0.694` versus all other lines: subgroup mean -0.3439 vs comparison mean -0.4443, effect 0.1005 on dependency_POLR2A; p=1.20e-166.

iterations.update: `feature_016` acted like a broad essential-dependency axis, especially for POLR2A.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with both `feature_016 >= 0.964` and `feature_023 >= 5.669` have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines with both `feature_016 >= 0.964` and `feature_026 >= 1.080` have more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines with `feature_003 >= 0.428` have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than cell lines with lower `feature_003`.
Among cell lines with `feature_003 >= 0.428`, `feature_030=1` further lowers `dependency_RPL11` beyond the additive effects of high `feature_003` and `feature_030=1`.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_016>=0.964` and `feature_023>=5.669` versus all other lines: subgroup mean -0.3892 vs comparison mean -0.3297, effect -0.0595 on dependency_DHX9; p=2.48e-21.
`feature_016>=0.964` and `feature_026>=1.080` versus all other lines: subgroup mean -0.2931 vs comparison mean -0.2514, effect -0.0417 on dependency_TMED10; p=1.49e-10.
`feature_003>=0.428` versus all other lines: subgroup mean -0.3440 vs comparison mean -0.2452, effect -0.0988 on dependency_RPL11; p=7.61e-160.
`feature_003>=0.428` by `feature_030=1`: interaction coefficient -0.0390 on dependency_RPL11; p=7.43e-03. Cell counts base+modifier/base-only/modifier-only/neither = 823/11678/2625/34874.
analyses.method: OLS interaction model: dependency ~ base + modifier + base:modifier

iterations.update: DHX9 and TMED10 were partly explained by high `feature_016` plus outcome-specific high continuous features; RPL11 followed `feature_003` with a smaller `feature_030` interaction.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for all cell-line features, `feature_009=1` remains associated with more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores.
After adjusting for all cell-line features, `feature_022=1` remains associated with more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores.
After adjusting for all cell-line features, `feature_024=1` remains associated with more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores.
After adjusting for all cell-line features, `feature_014=1` remains associated with more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores.
After adjusting for all cell-line features, `feature_027=1` remains associated with more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_009=1` adjusted association: adjusted coefficient -0.5543 on dependency_BRAF; p<1e-300; model R^2=0.203.
analyses.method: OLS adjusted for categorical lineage/subtype/culture/batch/feature_001, all binary indicators, and standardized continuous features

analyses.result_summary: `feature_022=1` adjusted association: adjusted coefficient -0.3492 on dependency_EGFR; p<1e-300; model R^2=0.072.
analyses.method: OLS adjusted for categorical lineage/subtype/culture/batch/feature_001, all binary indicators, and standardized continuous features

analyses.result_summary: `feature_024=1` adjusted association: adjusted coefficient -0.4327 on dependency_ERBB2; p<1e-300; model R^2=0.122.
analyses.method: OLS adjusted for categorical lineage/subtype/culture/batch/feature_001, all binary indicators, and standardized continuous features

analyses.result_summary: `feature_014=1` adjusted association: adjusted coefficient -0.3097 on dependency_KRAS; p<1e-300; model R^2=0.127.
analyses.method: OLS adjusted for categorical lineage/subtype/culture/batch/feature_001, all binary indicators, and standardized continuous features

analyses.result_summary: `feature_027=1` adjusted association: adjusted coefficient -0.0955 on dependency_RIT1; p=6.30e-69; model R^2=0.010.
analyses.method: OLS adjusted for categorical lineage/subtype/culture/batch/feature_001, all binary indicators, and standardized continuous features

iterations.update: Adjusted models confirmed that the binary oncogene-like features were not artifacts of lineage, subtype, culture, batch, or other measured features.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a systematic modifier screen for `dependency_BRAF`, `feature_021=1` will further lower `dependency_BRAF` among `feature_009=1` cell lines beyond additive effects.
In a systematic modifier screen for `dependency_EGFR`, `feature_023 >= 5.669` will further lower `dependency_EGFR` among `feature_022=1` cell lines beyond additive effects.
In a systematic modifier screen for `dependency_ERBB2`, `feature_010="her2_enriched"` will further lower `dependency_ERBB2` among `feature_024=1` cell lines beyond additive effects.
In a systematic modifier screen for `dependency_KRAS`, `feature_010="her2_enriched"` will further lower `dependency_KRAS` among `feature_014=1` cell lines beyond additive effects.
In a systematic modifier screen for `dependency_RIT1`, `feature_011="brain"` will further lower `dependency_RIT1` among `feature_027=1` cell lines beyond additive effects.

analyses.code: Systematic 2x2 OLS interaction screen over all categorical levels, binary indicators, feature_001 levels, and continuous Q1/Q3 predicates; recorded strongest negative modifier.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_009=1` by `feature_021=1` from systematic BRAF screen: interaction coefficient -0.0351 on dependency_BRAF; p=1.17e-01. Cell counts base+modifier/base-only/modifier-only/neither = 295/5279/2191/42235.
analyses.method: OLS interaction model: dependency ~ base + modifier + base:modifier

analyses.code: Systematic 2x2 OLS interaction screen over all categorical levels, binary indicators, feature_001 levels, and continuous Q1/Q3 predicates; recorded strongest negative modifier.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_022=1` by `feature_023>=5.669` from systematic EGFR screen: interaction coefficient -0.0299 on dependency_EGFR; p=2.80e-02. Cell counts base+modifier/base-only/modifier-only/neither = 940/2940/11561/34559.
analyses.method: OLS interaction model: dependency ~ base + modifier + base:modifier

analyses.code: Systematic 2x2 OLS interaction screen over all categorical levels, binary indicators, feature_001 levels, and continuous Q1/Q3 predicates; recorded strongest negative modifier.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_024=1` by `feature_010="her2_enriched"` from systematic ERBB2 screen: interaction coefficient -0.0671 on dependency_ERBB2; p=3.72e-02. Cell counts base+modifier/base-only/modifier-only/neither = 142/4748/888/44222.
analyses.method: OLS interaction model: dependency ~ base + modifier + base:modifier

analyses.code: Systematic 2x2 OLS interaction screen over all categorical levels, binary indicators, feature_001 levels, and continuous Q1/Q3 predicates; recorded strongest negative modifier.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_014=1` by `feature_010="her2_enriched"` from systematic KRAS screen: interaction coefficient -0.0693 on dependency_KRAS; p=3.41e-02. Cell counts base+modifier/base-only/modifier-only/neither = 134/11708/896/37262.
analyses.method: OLS interaction model: dependency ~ base + modifier + base:modifier

analyses.code: Systematic 2x2 OLS interaction screen over all categorical levels, binary indicators, feature_001 levels, and continuous Q1/Q3 predicates; recorded strongest negative modifier.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_027=1` by `feature_011="brain"` from systematic RIT1 screen: interaction coefficient -0.0582 on dependency_RIT1; p=5.64e-03. Cell counts base+modifier/base-only/modifier-only/neither = 329/4231/3236/42204.
analyses.method: OLS interaction model: dependency ~ base + modifier + base:modifier

iterations.update: The systematic interaction screen found no convincing BRAF modifier, but identified modest EGFR/ERBB2/KRAS/RIT1 modifiers.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a systematic modifier screen for `dependency_KIF18A`, `feature_035=1` will further lower `dependency_KIF18A` among `feature_011="colorectal"` cell lines beyond additive effects.
In a systematic modifier screen for `dependency_TMED10`, `feature_011="prostate"` will further lower `dependency_TMED10` among `feature_016 >= 0.964` cell lines beyond additive effects.
In a systematic modifier screen for `dependency_DHX9`, `feature_027=1` will further lower `dependency_DHX9` among `feature_016 >= 0.964` cell lines beyond additive effects.
In a systematic modifier screen for `dependency_POLR2A`, `feature_010="her2_enriched"` will further lower `dependency_POLR2A` among `feature_016 >= 0.964` cell lines beyond additive effects.
In a systematic modifier screen for `dependency_RPL11`, `feature_030=1` will further lower `dependency_RPL11` among `feature_003 >= 0.428` cell lines beyond additive effects.

analyses.code: Systematic 2x2 OLS interaction screen over all categorical levels, binary indicators, feature_001 levels, and continuous Q1/Q3 predicates; recorded strongest negative modifier.

analyses.method: OLS interaction model: dependency ~ base + modifier + base:modifier

analyses.code: Systematic 2x2 OLS interaction screen over all categorical levels, binary indicators, feature_001 levels, and continuous Q1/Q3 predicates; recorded strongest negative modifier.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_016>=0.964` by `feature_011="prostate"` from systematic TMED10 screen: interaction coefficient -0.0309 on dependency_TMED10; p=6.26e-02. Cell counts base+modifier/base-only/modifier-only/neither = 621/11956/1897/35526.
analyses.method: OLS interaction model: dependency ~ base + modifier + base:modifier

analyses.code: Systematic 2x2 OLS interaction screen over all categorical levels, binary indicators, feature_001 levels, and continuous Q1/Q3 predicates; recorded strongest negative modifier.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_016>=0.964` by `feature_027=1` from systematic DHX9 screen: interaction coefficient -0.0323 on dependency_DHX9; p=9.67e-03. Cell counts base+modifier/base-only/modifier-only/neither = 1156/11421/3404/34019.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_016>=0.964` by `feature_010="her2_enriched"` from systematic POLR2A screen: interaction coefficient -0.0551 on dependency_POLR2A; p=3.27e-02. Cell counts base+modifier/base-only/modifier-only/neither = 252/12325/778/36645.
analyses.method: OLS interaction model: dependency ~ base + modifier + base:modifier

analyses.code: Systematic 2x2 OLS interaction screen over all categorical levels, binary indicators, feature_001 levels, and continuous Q1/Q3 predicates; recorded strongest negative modifier.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_003>=0.428` by `feature_030=1` from systematic RPL11 screen: interaction coefficient -0.0390 on dependency_RPL11; p=7.43e-03. Cell counts base+modifier/base-only/modifier-only/neither = 823/11678/2625/34874.
analyses.method: OLS interaction model: dependency ~ base + modifier + base:modifier

iterations.update: The systematic screen covered the remaining five dependency outcomes; KIF18A had the largest interaction by far, while TMED10 showed no significant extra modifier.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Final BRAF subgroup: cell lines with `feature_009=1` have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than all other cell lines.
Final EGFR subgroup: cell lines with `feature_022=1` and `feature_023 >= 5.669` have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than all other cell lines.
Final ERBB2 subgroup: cell lines with `feature_024=1` and `feature_010="her2_enriched"` have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than all other cell lines.
Final KRAS subgroup: cell lines with `feature_014=1` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than all other cell lines, without requiring a lineage restriction.
Final RIT1 subgroup: cell lines with `feature_027=1` and `feature_011="brain"` have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than all other cell lines.

Final KIF18A subgroup: cell lines with `feature_011="colorectal"`, `feature_035=1`, `feature_028 >= 0.819`, and `feature_020=0` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than all other cell lines.
Final TMED10 subgroup: cell lines with `feature_016 >= 0.964` and `feature_026 >= 1.080` have more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than all other cell lines.
Final DHX9 subgroup: cell lines with `feature_016 >= 0.964` and `feature_023 >= 5.669` have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than all other cell lines.
Final POLR2A subgroup: cell lines with `feature_016 >= 0.964` have more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores than all other cell lines.
Final RPL11 subgroup: cell lines with `feature_003 >= 0.428` and `feature_030=1` have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than all other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: Final BRAF subgroup `feature_009=1`: subgroup mean -0.8047 vs comparison mean -0.2495, effect -0.5552 on dependency_BRAF; p<1e-300.
Final EGFR subgroup `feature_022=1 & feature_023>=5.669`: subgroup mean -0.6240 vs comparison mean -0.2729, effect -0.3511 on dependency_EGFR; p=4.52e-144.
Final ERBB2 subgroup `feature_024=1 & feature_010="her2_enriched"`: subgroup mean -0.7525 vs comparison mean -0.2944, effect -0.4581 on dependency_ERBB2; p=6.99e-32.
Final KRAS subgroup `feature_014=1`: subgroup mean -0.5594 vs comparison mean -0.2520, effect -0.3075 on dependency_KRAS; p<1e-300.
Final RIT1 subgroup `feature_027=1 & feature_011="brain"`: subgroup mean -0.4047 vs comparison mean -0.2650, effect -0.1397 on dependency_RIT1; p=1.01e-12.
Final KIF18A subgroup `colorectal & feature_035=1 & feature_028>=0.819 & feature_020=0`: subgroup mean -1.2990 vs comparison mean -0.2530, effect -1.0460 on dependency_KIF18A; p<1e-300.
Final TMED10 subgroup `feature_016>=0.964 & feature_026>=1.080`: subgroup mean -0.2931 vs comparison mean -0.2514, effect -0.0417 on dependency_TMED10; p=1.49e-10.
Final DHX9 subgroup `feature_016>=0.964 & feature_023>=5.669`: subgroup mean -0.3892 vs comparison mean -0.3297, effect -0.0595 on dependency_DHX9; p=2.48e-21.
Final POLR2A subgroup `feature_016>=0.964`: subgroup mean -0.4972 vs comparison mean -0.3928, effect -0.1043 on dependency_POLR2A; p=1.01e-179.
Final RPL11 subgroup `feature_003>=0.428 & feature_030=1`: subgroup mean -0.3759 vs comparison mean -0.2681, effect -0.1078 on dependency_RPL11; p=5.35e-17.

iterations.update: Final subgroup definitions were selected from the strongest supported main-effect, interaction, and subgroup tests for each dependency outcome.
